series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains all transaction documentation involving record management for deliveries, deposits, retrievals, and returns of the ODPS Records Center. Records include tracking numbers, box numbers, box numbers, box content descriptions, record schedule Series Authorization Numbers (SAN), and relevant dates for record retention and destruction.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retrievals and returns are maintained in the Asset & Inventory Management System (AIMS) for two (2) years after the disposal of records to which they refer. ; Paper: Deposits are retained until disposal of records to which they refer. Deliveries, retrievals, and returns are retained for two (2) years after transaction is completed, then destroy.., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
